name: Lena Lakes (Olympic NF + NP)
notes: Cross-boundary pilot region per BACKLOG: Lower Lena Lake is a first-come, no-permit site in Olympic National Forest; Upper Lena Lake is inside Olympic National Park on permit 4098362. Overlay coords are curated (rec.gov's Upper Lena coordinate is ~18 mi off and is overridden here). Edge figures derive from AllTrails official MCP, 2026-07-13.

camps.name: LLL - Lower Lena Lake Camp
camps.note: First-come sites, no permit or fee; NW Forest Pass for trailhead parking. Coords approximate, QA queued.
